name: amasty/module-store-locator-subscription-package
description: Store Locator Subscription Package by Amasty

suggest.amasty/module-store-locator-graphql: Install this package to ensure Amasty Store Locator extension works with GraphQl
suggest.amasty/module-store-locator-import-entit: Install this package for Import Locations compatibility.
suggest.amasty/module-store-locator-export-entit: Install this package for Export Locations compatibility.
suggest.amasty/module-storelocator-holidays: Install this package to set up Location Holiday schedules.
suggest.amasty/module-storelocator-subscription-: Install this package for compatibility with Meta Keywords functionality.
suggest.amasty/module-storelocator-hyva: Install this package to ensure the Store Locator extension works with the Hyvä Theme.
suggest.amasty/module-store-locator-xml-sitemap: Install this package to make sure Store Locator pages are added to Amasty XML Sitemap.
suggest.amasty/module-storelocator-subscription-: Install this package for compatibility with subscription features and to ensure it works properly with the Hyva Theme.
